evals.prompt: Generate a watercolor painting of a cat reading a book in a cozy library
evals.expected_output: A single PNG image in watercolor style showing a cat reading in a library setting

evals.prompt: Create a minimalist logo for a coffee shop called 'Bean & Brew' with transparent background
evals.expected_output: A PNG image with transparent background showing a clean minimalist coffee shop logo with the text 'Bean & Brew'

evals.prompt: Create a motivational poster with a mountain sunset and the text 'The journey begins with a single step'
evals.expected_output: A portrait-oriented image with a mountain sunset scene and legible text overlay reading 'The journey begins with a single step'
